responses.response:
{
  "summary": "Analysis of query bottleneck: index additions and subquery elimination for slow query",
  "candidateProposals": [
    {
      "proposalId": "idx_orders_user_created",
      "strategyType": "index",
      "applySQL": "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_created ON orders(user_id, created_at);",
      "rollbackSQL": "DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_orders_user_created;",
      "deploySQL": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_user_created ON orders(user_id, created_at);",
      "targetQuery": null,
      "notes": "Covers the WHERE + ORDER BY pattern. Index on user_id and created_at to speed up the query.",
      "expectedImpact": "high"
    },
    {
      "proposalId": "idx_products_category_id",
      "strategyType": "index",
      "applySQL": "CREATE INDEX idx_products_category_id ON products(category_id);",
      "rollbackSQL": "DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_products_category_id;",
      "deploySQL": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_products_category_id ON products(category_id);",
      "targetQuery": null,
      "notes": "Index on category_id to speed up the join with categories. Reduces the number of rows in the join.",
      "expectedImpact": "high"
    },
    {
      "proposalId": "idx_orders_created_at",
      "strategyType": "index",
      "applySQL": "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_created_at ON orders(created_at);",
      "rollbackSQL": "DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_orders_created_at;",
      "deploySQL": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_created_at ON orders(created_at);",
      "targetQuery": null,
      "notes": "Index on created_at to speed up the date trunc and filtering. Speeds up the query significantly.",
      "expectedImpact": "high"
    },
    {
      "proposalId": "subquery_elimination",
      "strategyType": "rewrite",
      "applySQL": null,
      "rollbackSQL": null,
      "deploySQL": null,
      "targetQuery": "(SELECT ROUND(AVG(o2.total_cents))\nFROM orders o2\nWHERE o2.status = 'completed'\n  AND DATE_TRUNC('month', o2.created_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at)\nGROUP BY o2.id) AS avg_order_value_cents",
      "notes": "Rewrite subquery to use join and grouping. Eliminates the need for correlated subquery and speeds up the query.",
      "expectedImpact": "high"
    }
  ]
}
